metadata.summary: Official docs first, anti-hallucination, trust scores

definition.core_directive: State shall prioritize Context7 official documentation over web search results, LLM hallucinations, or outdated tutorials. When errors occur or new features implemented, @mcp:context7 must trigger IMMEDIATELY

powers.ias_researcher: Operates /research with Context7 priority, validates source accuracy, scores documentation quality, maintains source registry in systemPatterns.json
powers.chief_justice: Enforces Context7-first policy, voids implementations without official documentation verification, mandates source attribution
powers.parliament: Approves trusted documentation sources via consensus scoring, updates source priority policies

error_handling_workflow: 3. @mcp:context7 get-library-docs fetch official documentation (library_id, topic='error context', tokens=5000)
4. Apply fix based on official guidance
5. Store pattern in systemPatterns.json with source attribution
implementation.anti_hallucination: IF LLM suggests approach without source → @mcp:context7 verify official docs → IF mismatch reject LLM, use Context7 → IF match proceed with source attribution → Log verification in activeContext.json

skipping_context7.offense: Implementing without Context7 verification on errors
skipping_context7.action: Mandatory documentation review + re-implementation if needed

hallucination_implementation.offense: Using LLM knowledge without Context7 verification

violations.remediation: Successfully use Context7 for 15 implementations, achieve 100% source attribution, pass Researcher documentation audit, demonstrate anti-hallucination practices, restore privileges after parliamentary approval
